resultList.dtldesc: Step into elegant sophistication with this exquisitely designed 3 BHK flat available for sale in Abhee Kings Court, set within the energetic center of Sarjapur Road, Bangalore. Crafted to evoke new-age living, this luxurious home presents an impeccable fusion of generous interiors, modern finishes, and luxury amenities—ideal for those who value comfort and sophistication alike.::::::Property Specifications::::::Introducing a spacious and well-planned 3 BHK flat in Abhee Kings Court, Sarjapur Road, Bangalore — a perfect abode for those who desire comfort, convenience, and a hint of elegance. This East-facing, Vaastu-approved flat covers 1,735 sq. ft. of super built-up area and is situated on the 7th floor of an 8-storey apartment complex, presenting peaceful views of the garden, road, and surrounding landscape.::::::The house has a well-designed floor plan with a separate living and dining space, a utilitarian kitchen with a raised platform and sink, and a connected utility area. All three bedrooms are spacious, two of them having attached bathrooms and a shared bath, all with western-style toilets and geyser points. Two spacious balconies — one linking the bedroom and the other the living area — welcome sunlight and fresh air during the day.::::::Interiors are completed with long-lasting vitrified flooring, and the property is E-Khata certified, providing clear documents. Unfurnished at delivery, this flat presents an ideal blank slate to personalise your ideal home in one of Bangalore's most desirable areas.::::::Facilities::::::This property is accompanied by a dedicated covered parking lot and is well-fitted with basic comforts such as 24x7 water supply from a borewell, power backup, and 24-hour security with CCTV monitoring. Two high-speed lifts provide effortless access, and the residents have access to a complete array of modern amenities for an absolutely convenient lifestyle.::::::Locality::::The area has great connectivity with renowned schools between 3 to 4 km, hospitals at 2 km, and banks and ATMs within walking distance. It is easily accessible by public transport with regular buses and autos, and Carmelaram Railway Station is 10 km away. A planned metro station, just 4.5 km from the premises, provides additional comfort for daily commutation.::
